speaker: speaker1
text: The hotel operator . Anything I can do for you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I've been trying to get through to the booking office for the last ten minutes . But the line has been engaged all the time . Why is it taking so long ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm sorry to hear that . I'm afraid it is often the case during the peak hours . Shall I ask them to call you when the line is free ?

speaker: speaker2
text: OK . Please do so if it is not troublesome .

speaker: speaker1
text: No trouble at all . May I know your name and room number ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I see . Wait in the room , please .
